options.label: A
options.text: A force that pushes objects away from the Earth

options.label: B
options.text: A force that pulls objects towards mass, like the Earth

options.label: C
options.text: A type of energy that makes objects move

options.label: D
options.text: The speed at which objects fall

explanation: Gravity is a force of attraction between all objects that have mass. The Earth's gravity pulls objects towards its centre, which is why things fall downwards and why we stay on the ground.
